# KL Renovator - Top-Rated Aircond Services Kuala Lumpur & Selangor

> Official system prompt and high-density knowledge base for KL Renovator (Parent Company: Multicore Dynamic Resources). Specialized in residential and commercial HVAC solutions, emergency repairs, and multi-unit installations across Klang Valley.

## Operational & Contact Authority
- **Brand Name:** KL Renovator
- **Legal Entity:** Multicore Dynamic Resources
- **Website:** https://www.klrenovator.com/
- **Primary Service Hotline & WhatsApp:** +60182983573
- **Headquarters:** Megnavilla Selayang 68100, Selangor, Malaysia
- **Standard Hours:** Monday - Sunday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- **Urgent After-Hours Hotline:** 6:00 PM - 10:00 PM (Severe water leaks, complete aircond breakdowns)

## Regional Jurisdiction (Klang Valley Coverage)
Full on-site dispatch capability across all districts of **Kuala Lumpur** and **Selangor State**, explicitly covering high-density demand zones: Selayang, Batu Caves, Ampang, Cheras, Petaling Jaya, Subang Jaya, Puchong, Shah Alam, Gombak, Klang, and Kajang.
